Welcome to Formula Mantra!
Your complete SSC/Bank/Railway formula practice app. 468 straight formula questions across 26 chapters — one question per formula — all offline, no internet needed.

How to Use — 3 Steps
1. Open Formula Library → revise formulas
2. Start Set 1 of a chapter → practice 25 questions
3. Review wrong answers → retry until perfect

Smart Features
📘 Revise Formula Sheet — appears after every answer
⚠️ Weak Areas — auto-detected on home screen
📅 Daily Target — track your daily progress
⏳ Exam Countdown — stay motivated!
🚀
Ready to Begin!
Start with Geometry Set 1 or explore the Formula Library. Aim for 25 questions every day. Good luck!

How to Use Formula Mantra
Complete guide for SSC / Bank / Railway aspirants
⚡ Quick Start (3 Steps)
1. Formulas tab → Open chapter → Read Key Formulas
2. Set 1 → Practice → Answer 25 questions
3. Wrong answer → tap 📘 Revise Formula Sheet
🎯 All Quiz Modes
Set 1,2,3... — 25 Q per set, chapter-wise
Speed Sprint — 15 sec each, builds exam speed
Daily 25 — Today's formula revision
Exam Level — Hardest questions only
Wrong Questions — Only your mistakes
Flashcards — Flip to memorise formulas
Bookmarks — Questions you saved
Random Quiz — Mixed 25 Q from all chapters
💡 Pro Tips
📅 Set Daily Target (25 Q/day) — track on home screen
⏳ Set Exam Countdown — stay motivated daily
⚠️ Read Student Traps in Formula Library
🔁 Retry wrong until 100% on every set
📊 Check Weak Areas on home screen
📊 SSC CGL Priority
🔴 Must Do: Percentages, P&L, Time Work, Geometry, Trigonometry
🟠 High: Algebra, Averages, Ratio, CI/SI, TDS
🟡 Medium: Mensuration, Number System, Mixture
🟢 Lower: Statistics, Probability, Coordinate Geometry
📋 3-Step Method
1
📚 Revise Formula Sheet
Open Formula Library → choose a chapter → read all formulas, examples, and traps before attempting questions.
2
✏️ Practice Set-by-Set
Open any chapter → start Set 1 (25 questions) → answer every question → read the explanation after each answer.
3
🔁 Retry Wrong Answers
After each quiz, tap Retry Wrong to practice only your mistakes until you score 100%.
⚡ Smart Features
📘
Revise Formula Sheet (after each question)
After answering, a blue button appears — tap it to instantly open that chapter's formula sheet.
⚠️
Weak Area Analysis
After 10+ attempts, your home screen shows chapters below 65% accuracy with a direct Revise button.
⏳
Exam Countdown
Tap Set Date on home screen → enter your exam name and date → see days remaining every time you open the app.
📅
Daily Target
Tap the 25Q button to set your daily question goal. Progress bar updates after every quiz.
🃏
Flashcards
In any chapter screen → tap Flashcards. Swipe through formulas — tap to flip and see the formula, use, and trap.
📱 How to Use on Mobile / Laptop
📲 Android phone: Open in Chrome → tap the ⋮ menu (top-right) → Add to Home screen. It installs like a real app and opens full-screen — works fully offline.
🍎 iPhone / iPad: Open in Safari → tap the Share button ⬆️ → Add to Home Screen. Launch it from the icon just like any app.
💻 Laptop / Desktop: Open in Chrome or Edge → click the install ⊕ icon in the address bar (or ⋮ menu → Install) to run it in its own window. You can also just keep the tab open and bookmark it.
📶 Works offline: Once opened, all 468 formula questions and formulas are stored on your device. No internet needed after the first load.
💾 Your progress is saved per device in that browser. Use the same browser/app icon each time so scores, weak areas, and bookmarks stay together. Avoid private/incognito mode — it clears progress when closed.
🖐️ On laptop: click answers with the mouse; on phone, just tap. Everything works the same on both — the layout adjusts to your screen size automatically.
Flashcards
